LanguageData.REN7_Gun_N7BlackHoleGenerator.label: M-490 Blackstorm
LanguageData.REN7_Gun_N7BattleRifle.label: N7 Valkyrie
LanguageData.REN7_Gun_N7LMG.label: N7 Typhoon
LanguageData.REN7_Gun_N7LMG.description: The Typhoon is a distinctive light machine gun featuring a face shield to protect the shooter from stray shots. It is heavy, clumsy and highly ammo intentsive to fire, but it more than made up for it through the sheer firepower it could put down range.(Has a 10% chance to deflect any incoming projectile)
LanguageData.RE_Gun_N7Pistol.label: N7 Eagle

LanguageData.REN7_Gun_N7Shotgun.label: N7 Crusader
LanguageData.REN7_Gun_N7ChainShotgun.label: N7 Piranha
